LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS ROBERT FARMER AND ROBERT WEAVER AND FARMER & RIDLEY LLP'S MOTION FOR PROTECTIVE ORDER RE DEFENDANT ROBERT FARMER'S DEPOSITION IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF'S CROSS-EXAMINATION OF DEFENDANT ROBERT L. FARMER AT DEPOSITION SHALL BE LIMITED TO 10 HOURS. THE DEPOSITION SHALL TAKE PLACE IN LOS ANGELES, CALIFORNIA AT DEFENSE COUNSEL'S OFFICE IN 3 CONSECUTIVE DAYS, WITH A MAXIMUM OF 3-1/2 HOURS PER DAY. DEPOSITION TO TAKE PLACE BY DECEMBER 16, 2013. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: JOANNA BROADWELL, CSR # 10959 TEL. 274-9977. (302)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order Re Deft Robert Farmer'S Deposition
Off Calendar Nov-25-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. STEVEN DILLICK, TEL. NO. 399-8777 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. JESSICA RUDIN MACGREGOR OF LONG & LEVIT LLP, TEL. NO. 397-2222 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS;
JOANNA BROADWELL OF VERITEXT, TEL. NO. 274-9977, COURT REPORTER.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS ROBERT FARMER, ROBERT WEAVER AND FARMER & RIDLEY LLP'S Motion For Protective Order Re Deft Robert Farmer'S Deposition is Granted. Plaintiff 's cross-examination of Defendant Robert L. Farmer at deposition shall be limited to 10 hours. The deposition shall take place in Los Angeles, California at defense counsel's office in consecutive 3 days, with a maximum of 3-1/2 hours per day. Deposition to take place by December 16, 2013.
